common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to approve or reject a prescription

request_params.description: Approve or reject the prescription. Available values: TRUE, FALSE.
request_params.name: is_approved

request_params.description:
Reject reason code. Available values: 

1 = Invalid Prescription (counterfeit/incorrect format)

2 = Incorrect Dosage

3 = No Prescription

4 = Unclear Image

5 = Free Text
request_params.name: reject_reason_code

request_params.description: The list of invalid items that make the prescription get rejected

children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a model of an item.
children.name: model_id

children.description: The identify of product promotion. For items in one same add on deal promotion, the group_id should share the same id. For items not in add on deal promotion, the group_id should be 0. And the data is from group_id of shopee.orders.GetOrderDetails.
children.name: group_id

request_params.name: items

request_params.description: Full name of the pharmacist. Required for PH and ID Prescription Orders.
request_params.name: pharmacist_name

request_params.description: The reason for rejecting the prescription. Only usable when the reject_reason_code = 5.
request_params.name: free_text

children.description: This is to indicate whether the request has been executed successfully.
children.name: is_success

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/order/handle_prescription_check?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "free_text": "-",
    "is_approved": true,
    "items": [
        {}
    ],
    "order_sn": "-",
    "pharmacist_name": "-"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: Add 5 (Free Text) option for reject_reason_code request parameter, and add new free_text request parameter
New field for pharmacist name for PH only.
